title: Limit Access to CUI on System Media to Authorized Users
description: limit access to CUI on system media to authorized users

checks.name: Access to CUI on System Media is Limited to Authorized Users
checks.purpose: Limitation of access to CUI on system media through physical access controls, encryption, and user authorization is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: Access to CUI on System Media is Limited to Authorized Users
checks.purpose: Limitation of access to CUI on system media is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Server

checks.name: Access to CUI on System Media is Limited to Authorized Users
checks.purpose: Limitation of access to CUI on system media is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Linux

checks.name: Access to CUI on System Media is Limited to Authorized Users
checks.purpose: Limitation of access to CUI on system media is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Debian

remediation: Implement access controls limiting CUI on system media to only authorized users. Use encryption, physical access controls, and user authentication to restrict access. Maintain a current list of users authorized to access CUI media and review it periodically.
